title: Bookending the debate, Jill Biden and Trump visit Virginia shore
shortDescription: The First Lady’s visit, announced Tuesday, underscores Virginia’s standing as a battleground state during the 2024 presidential election.

title: Yes, Donald Trump's vice presidential prospects are flocking to the Atlanta debate
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump and President Joe Biden won't be the only national candidates speaking tonight in Atlanta.

title: Where do Trump and Biden stand on the economy?
shortDescription: The economy and inflation are key issues for voters in 2024. Here's how Joe Biden and Donald Trump plan to fix things.

title: Presidential debate: Biden v. Trump in Atlanta, in photos
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump squared off during the "CNN Presidential Debate", for their first debate of 2024. The two debated each other twice in 2020.

title: 'Tell me when to go': Fat Joe and E-40 will join Biden for N.C. rally
shortDescription: Rappers Fat Joe and E-40 will appear 'all the way up' at a Biden-Harris 2024 campaign in Raleigh, North Carolina, on Friday.

title: Trump's VP pick: Here's everything to know about the candidates
shortDescription: Donald Trump is looking for a vice presidential candidate. His pick could be in Atlanta Thursday for CNN's Presidential Debate. See the short list.

title: OnPolitics: Trump and Biden set to face off for the first 2024 debate
shortDescription: Donald Trump and Joe Biden will compete Thursday night during the first presidential debate of the 2024 race for the White House.

title: Mary Trump, niece of Donald Trump, stumps for Biden at debate
shortDescription: Mary Trump, niece of former President Donald Trump, stopped by the spin room ahead of Thursday's CNN presidential debate in Atlanta.

title: How old are Joe Biden and Donald Trump going into first debate?
shortDescription: Age has been an issue for President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump ahead of the first Presidential debate. See how old they are.

title: Parents sue Louisiana over law requiring Ten Commandments in schools
shortDescription: Gov. Jeff Landry signed a bill requiring public schools to display the Ten Commandments. Parents say it violates their First Amendment rights.

title: Judge rejects Trump argument, upholds FBI search of Mar-a-Lago
shortDescription: Judge Aileen Cannon found justification for the FBI search for classified documents at Mar-a-Lago. despite the former president's complaints.

title: Presidential debate live updates: Trump's plane lands in Atlanta
shortDescription: The debate between Joe Biden and Donald Trump marks the first time the two men have formally sparred since the 2020 election.

title: Watch Trump, Biden debate live in 'CNN Presidential Debate'
shortDescription: The "CNN Presidential Debate" will air Thursday, June 27 at 9 p.m. ET on CNN or simulcast on USA TODAY

title: Georgia Gov. says he did not vote for Trump in the primary
shortDescription: Brian Kemp, the Georgia governor who has clashed with Trump multiple times since 2020, reveals he did not vote for the party frontrunner in March.

title: Trump says his future VP will be at the debate. So will Byron Donalds
shortDescription: Trump has said his vice presidential pick will be at the Atlanta debate. Naples Congressman Byron Donalds will be too.
